results.title: Vida: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask - Product Hunt
results.content:
2.   Local-first memory. Your interaction history is stored on your own device whenever possible, so you stay in control of your data.

3.   Never used for model training. Your data is never used to train or improve our AI models.

When Vida connects to tools like Slack, Notion, or Figma, it only accesses the specific context required to complete the task you’ve asked it to perform. The goal is to make Vida genuinely useful while keeping your data private and fully under your control.

Maker [...] Also, Vida never deletes your files. The Workspace Cleanup flow is strictly about organizing and archiving, not removing anything.

The idea is to make your workspace cleaner and easier to navigate, while keeping full control in your hands.

results.title: AI Voice Cloning: Clone Any Voice in 3 Seconds - Product Hunt
results.content:
Aris Nakos

Hot take: finally, a way to clone my own voice and prank my future self. This is wild tech—didn't realize you could nail soul in three seconds without a visit to a jazz club. What channels have you found work best for reaching video creators versus businesses? PS: I’ve emailed you leads from Reddit. Cheers & keep shipping.

Johannes Ganthaler
YU QING

@johannes\_ganthaler During my use, I actually find that the voice generated by AI Voice Cloning sounds more natural.

Yong Woo Shin
Prit

Prit

Thanks for not putting the signup page during the trial,

I could definitely feel the power of this product.

I hope your product to be used in right ways :)

Congratulations, @maryclayton!

Rajan RK [...] 🚀 Don’t believe it? Listen to this Trump clone we made from just 3 seconds of audio: (

And the best part? The core cloning features are always free. We want everyone to experience that “wait, is this real?” moment.

We’d love your honest feedback:

What details impress you most? (Natural pauses, emotional range, subtle pitch shifts?)

Any wild use cases or ideas for improvement?

Whose voice would you want to bring into the digital world?

Let’s talk in the comments! We’re obsessed with pushing boundaries—and your feedback is what drives us.

Gaayathri Murugan
Velozity

Velozity

@maryclayton This carzy cool and scary. But super useful to generate natural sounding voice for videos. Great job guys.

Nima Aksoy [...] This is the audio for "My name is Nika" btw.

YU QING

@busmark\_w\_nika This website only supports Chinese and English. It should be impossible to clone in languages other than these two.

Rags
Jo

Jo

Just tried it, and it was a mixed bag to be fair - but a good mix :) I thought you were able to replicate a voice that I felt definitely 'sounds' like me, which is pretty awesome (and scary good!). But where it was less impressive was in reading out a sample sentence - that didn't feel very natural. I do suspect thought that is a different class of problem compared to cloning, which is what you are solving? That said -> amazing launch product - all my best!

Aris Nakos
